installation_requirements.electrical_connection: Final connection to local/national code is responsibility of electrical contractor; more than one point of connection may be required
installation_requirements.electrical_not_provided: Disconnect switches, main fuses, and main power leads are NOT provided by Mohawk
installation_requirements.pneumatic_power: Responsibility of mechanical contractor to final designated point at vehicle lift

specifications.track_length_note: Other lengths available (special - contact Mohawk); above is not tip-to-tip length

features: 4-post track lift for vehicles up to 19,000 lbs
4 lift orientation options (A, B, C, D)

optional_equipment.note: 48 inch inside tracks only; additional cost
48 inch inside tracks only; additional cost
48 inch inside tracks only; additional cost

optional_equipment.item: Extra Base Plates for Shimming (1/2 inch thick)
optional_equipment.note: Requires longer anchor bolts to meet minimum embedment depth; not supplied with standard lift

notes: Some option combinations are NOT available
All lift options checked for purchase must be listed on purchase order as separate line items
Vehicle data forms must be attached for vehicles intended for this lift
Fill out data forms for largest, smallest, and lowest underclearance vehicles
Review under-vehicle clearance over ramps, bumper clearance approaching ramps, rear end drag clearance over ramps, overhead clearance when fully raised, wheel base length over track length
Truck Data Form (Dual Axle Rear) included - drawing ZZ06 dated 1/95
Construction project delivery requires advance coordination for production time verification
